fields.name: httpRequest
fields.description: Makes an HTTP request using sandboxed fetch. Returns an object with status, headers, and parsed data (JSON or text).

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL to send the request to

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, etc.)

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Request body (string or object, auto-serialized to JSON)

fields.return_type: { status: number, headers: object, data: any }

fields.name: postToSlack
fields.description: Posts a message to a Slack incoming webhook URL. Supports plain text and Block Kit blocks.

fields.name: getChildren
fields.description: Gets all child work items of a given parent work item using the Plane SDK.

fields.name: getSiblings
fields.description: Gets sibling work items (same parent, excluding self). Retrieves the item to find its parent, then lists that parent's children.

parameters.name: workItemId
parameters.description: The work item ID to find siblings of

fields.name: addComment
fields.description: Adds a comment to a work item. Accepts plain text or HTML.

parameters.name: workItemId
parameters.description: The work item ID to comment on

fields.name: addLabel
fields.description: Finds a label by name (or creates it) and attaches it to a work item.

parameters.name: workItemId
parameters.description: The work item ID to label

parameters.name: labelName
parameters.description: Name of the label to find or create

fields.name: addWorkItem
fields.description: Creates a work item in given project with details provided

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID to create work item in

fields.name: updateWorkItemState
fields.description: Updates the status for a given work item
